title: Circles
subtitle: Your savings groups — setup and active.
sessionMissing: Your session is missing an access token. Sign in again.
freePlan: Free plan: 1 open circle at a time
deleteAllMessage_one: This permanently removes {{count}} setup/draft circle you organize. Active and completed circles are not affected. This cannot be undone.
deleteAllMessage_other: This permanently removes {{count}} setup/draft circles you organize. Active and completed circles are not affected. This cannot be undone.
nothingRemoved: No deletable setup circles were found (they may have already been removed).
deleteOneMessage: “{{circleName}}” will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
joinWithCode: Join a circle with a code
completedDescription: View finished groups and restart one if you want.
joinStep1Title: Get the invite link from the organizer
joinStep1Description: The organizer shares a unique link to join their circle.
joinStep2Title: Open the link and sign in
joinStep2Description: Tap the link and sign into your account (or create one).
joinStep3Description: You will instantly be added to the circle roster.
joinStep4Description: Track contributions, see payouts, and know when it’s your turn.
emptyDescription: Create a savings group or join one with an invite link.
helpBody: Create a circle and invite people you trust, or join one with an invite code. Each member contributes on schedule and members take turns receiving the payout.
